name: Integrated Device Technology, Inc.
description: Integrated Device Technology, Inc. (IDT) designs, manufactures, and markets low-power, high-performance mixed-signal semiconductor solutions for the advanced communications, computing, consumer, and automotive industries. The company's product portfolio includes timing devices, wireless power transfer technology, serial switching products, interface devices, and radio frequency (RF) solutions. IDT's products are designed to optimize system performance and efficiency in applications such as cloud data centers, 5G infrastructure, and smart mobile devices. The company was acquired by Renesas Electronics Corporation in 2019.
